Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being assigned by Department 501 for Short Cause Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing as to Defendant Elite Dental Care P.C., a Domestic Professional Service Corporation.

Dept. 514; Judge Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:27:12 a.m. and adjourning at 11:36:49 a.m.

David Julian Cook, Esq. appeared with and on behalf of Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a Delaware Corporation via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Elite Dental Care P.C., a Domestic Professional Service Corporation is not present.

Kent Alleyne, Finance Director/Custodian of Records, is placed under oath and testifies on behalf of Plaintiff. Witness appeared via Zoom Video Conference.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:

Exhibit A: List of all bills and totals...........ID/EVID

The matter is submitted.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a Delaware Corporation, and against Defendant Elite Dental Care P.C., a Domestic Professional Service Corporation, as follows:

Damages: $44,457.65
Prejudgment Interest: $7,081.81
Attorney Fees: $1,000.00
Costs: $435.00

Total Judgment: $52,954.46

Proposed judgment signed and filed.
